author: doll-agent
content: Created tests/api_proof.rs with 9 integration tests covering: splitters (10 splitter types), train_test_split, dummy estimators (full Fit/Predict cycle for both), param_grid! macro + ParamValue + 4 distributions, search estimators (GridSearch/Randomized/HalvingGrid/HalvingRandom constructor + accessors), meta-estimators (OneVsRest/OneVsOne/MultiOutput*/Calibrated/SelfTraining/TransformedTarget), FeatureUnion, learning_curve/validation_curve signatures, CrossValidateResult fields. All 9 pass.
